signals.headline: Joel Embiid Unlikely to Return**
signals.raw:
Joel Embiid Unlikely to Return**

It's been confirmed that Joel Embiid will not play in the playoffs as he recovers from an appendectomy[2], significantly impacting the Celtics' championship hopes.

signals.headline: Pectra Upgrade Enters Final Testing Phase** | YES | HIGH confidence
signals.raw:
Pectra Upgrade Enters Final Testing Phase** | YES | HIGH confidence
The Prague-Electra (Pectra) Upgrade is in its final testing phase and promises to revolutionize wallet abstraction and validator efficiency, driving institutional demand for Ethereum.[2]

Oklahoma City Thunder Dominate Game 2 vs Phoenix Suns | YES (Thunder Advancing) | HIGH confidence**

The Thunder are leading their first-round series 1-0 after a dominant 35-point victory in Game 1, and secured Game 2 with a 104-80 win[1][4]. Game 3 shifts to Phoenix on Saturday[1].

signals.headline: Detroit Pistons Secure First Home Playoff Win Since 2008 vs Orlando Magic | YES (Series Competitive) | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Detroit Pistons Secure First Home Playoff Win Since 2008 vs Orlando Magic | YES (Series Competitive) | HIGH confidence**

The Pistons bounced back with a Game 2 victory over Orlando, marking their first home playoff win in 18 years[3]. This was noted as the only "real upset" in early playoff action[2].
